allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(json.dumps\({k: v for k,v in x.items\(\) if k in ['conditionId','question','createdAt','startDate','endDate','enableOrderBook','liquidityClob']}, indent=2\)\) for x in m[:2]]")
